blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,047 ft. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: heavy drizzle, highs of 46°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 43".
